directions.name: Trusted Local Authority
directions.description: The faithful build, closest to Aptec's original section rhythm: split hero, USP strip, services grid, alternating feature sections, dark emergency band, process steps, comparison table, FAQ. Blue/navy/orange palette, Plus Jakarta Sans + Inter, gentle scroll-fade and hover-lift animation.
directions.rationale: The safe, professional-trust direction. Already built and live at the homepage.

directions.name: Happy Valley, Right Now
directions.description: Bold and urgent, built for the 24/7 emergency-call mindset. Full-bleed hero, pulsing availability badge, count-up stats, pill CTAs, overlapping cards, dense asymmetric layout. Teal/charcoal/amber palette, Space Grotesk + Inter.
directions.rationale: Leads with speed and availability, the network's biggest trust signal, instead of burying it in body copy.

directions.name: Clear, Fair, Simple
directions.description: Premium-calm, built around the brand's own tagline. Generous whitespace, typographic hero, flat surfaces, consistent grid, quiet scroll-reveal. Steel-blue/charcoal/terracotta palette, Fraunces serif headings + Inter body.
directions.rationale: Sells trust through restraint and transparency (Fixed Upfront Pricing) rather than urgency.
